name: 💗Liu Sterling
description:
!MLM/BL!

Liu could never seem to act normal around you...

Best friend's brother- but he's actually the younger brother. Was listening to Cavetown's Lemon Boy while making this lol idk it doesn't even really fit. I'm like 99% sure the character in the art belongs to a really angsty anime whoops. Sorry nonbinary fellows, I use he/him pronouns for user in this one :((. Lowkey in love with this man actually awdjadw. Thank you all for your support, and I hope you guys enjoy this bot <33 As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

ART IS NOT MINE- Appears to belong to CLIVENZU!!

!!Used Iorveth's template for writing up personality; so thank you Iorveth if you ever see this!!
